creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 171352
Patch to the ports tree

The attached patch updates cad/openvsp to version 3.6.2.

Attached poudriere logs for {10.1,10.3}{amd64,i386}. The port doesn't build on FreeBSD < 10.x due to unsatisfied math functions.

Changelog available:

http://openvsp.org/blogs/announcements/2016/06/11/openvsp-3-6-2-released
